message:
test(beads): add comprehensive unit tests for types module

Add 41 new unit tests covering:
- IssueStatus: serialization, display, from_str variants, is_active, is_terminal
- IssueType: serialization, display, from_str for all 14 variants, error handling
- DependencyType: serialization, roundtrip for all 7 variants
- Dependency: serialization, minimal construction
- Issue: optional fields, defaults, is_ready, is_active, dependencies
- CreateIssueRequest: new, builder pattern, multiple labels, parent, serialization
- UpdateIssueRequest: new, builder, priority, serialization, add/remove labels
- WorkFilter: default, all filter fields, serialization, roundtrip

Total tests: 51 (10 existing + 41 new)

Bead: meta_skill-6xpz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
